info.title: Procurement Management Platform API
info.description: Enterprise-grade multi-tenant SaaS procurement platform API. Authentication: JWT Bearer token via POST /api/v1/auth/login (Authorization: Bearer token). Tenant identification: X-Tenant-ID header, subdomain, or JWT claim. All responses follow a standard envelope with success, data, message, errors, and meta fields. Every response includes X-Request-ID header. Rate limits: 60/min auth, 300/min API.

post.description: Advances the document to the next approval level or marks it approved if on the final level.

200.description: Approved — document advanced or fully approved.

403.description: Not authorised to act on this approval.

post.description: Rejects the document at the current level. Mandatory rejection reason. Notifies the originator.

reason.example: Budget allocation insufficient for this fiscal year.

post.description: Returns the document to the originator for revision. Mandatory comments required.

comments.example: Please attach supporting quotes from at least 3 vendors.

get.summary: List pending approvals for authenticated user
get.description: Returns all approval records currently pending action from the authenticated user, ordered by creation date ascending.

get.summary: Get approval history for a document
get.description: Returns the full approval history (all levels and actions) for the specified document.

parameters.name: documentType
parameters.description: Document type, e.g. purchase_request, tender, purchase_order, contract, invoice.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of approval workflow configurations for the active tenant.

post.description: Creates a new approval workflow with its initial levels. Levels are sequential approval stages (1–10 max).

delete.description: Sets is_active=false to preserve historical documents. Does not hard-delete.

post.description: Appends a new sequential level to an existing approval workflow. level_order, approver_type are required.

delete.description: Deletes a specific level from an approval workflow. Returns 404 if the level does not belong to the specified workflow.

get.description: Returns paginated audit log entries. System_Admin sees all tenants; Tenant_Admin is scoped to own tenant.

put.summary: Attempt to update audit log — always HTTP 403
put.description: Audit logs are immutable. This endpoint always returns HTTP 403 regardless of role.

delete.summary: Attempt to delete audit log — always HTTP 403
delete.description: Audit logs are immutable. This endpoint always returns HTTP 403 regardless of role.

post.description: Validates credentials for the active tenant and returns a signed JWT. The JWT payload includes: user_id, tenant_id, role, permissions, iat, exp, jti.

429.description: Too many requests — rate limit exceeded (60/min per IP).

post.description: Blacklists the current JWT's jti in Redis so it cannot be reused. Records logout in the audit log.
Issues a new JWT and blacklists the old token's jti.

get.description: Returns the full profile of the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Sends a 60-minute reset link to the registered email. Always returns HTTP 200 to prevent user enumeration.

200.description: If account exists, reset link sent.

post.description: Resets the user's password using the token from the reset email. Token is valid for 60 minutes.

get.description: Returns a CSRF token for browser-based clients. The token is also set as an XSRF-TOKEN cookie.
Suppliers only see their own bid. Procurement officers and admins see all bids.

post.description: Validates submission timestamp against deadline. Enforces one bid per supplier. Supplier must be active.

422.description: Deadline passed, duplicate bid, or supplier not active.

get.description: Suppliers may only view their own bid — returns HTTP 404 for others' bids.

422.description: Deadline passed or bid does not belong to supplier.

post.description: Defines (or replaces) weighted evaluation criteria. All weights must sum to 100.
Records an evaluator's score for a specific (bid, criteria) pair. Score 0–100.

get.description: Returns all submitted bids ranked by weighted score. Score blinding active when not all evaluators have submitted. In price-only mode, bids ranked by total_amount ascending.

post.description: Marks the winning bid as 'won', all others as 'lost', updates tender status to 'awarded', and notifies all suppliers.

justification.example: Highest weighted score with best delivery time.

422.description: Empty justification or service rule failure.

put.description: Updates an existing budget's total_amount and/or currency for the active tenant. Roles: Finance_Officer.

post.description: Transitions contract from draft to active. Blocked if no performance bond document is uploaded (HTTP 422).

422.description: No performance bond uploaded or invalid state.

post.description: Amends contract with documented reason. Creates version history entry.

reason.example: Scope expanded to include additional deliverables.

post.description: Terminates an active contract with a documented reason.

reason.example: Supplier failed to meet contractual obligations.

post.description: Accepted document types: performance_bond, signed_contract, amendment, other. Max 10 MB.

409.description: Cannot delete — has children or active users.

get.description: Streams a file to the authenticated client. The path parameter must be a base64-encoded storage path. Tenant isolation enforced.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Base64-encoded storage path of the file.

post.description: Assigns ≥2 Committee_Members to inspect the GRN. Transitions status to under_inspection.

422.description: Fewer than 2 committee members or invalid state.

post.description: Submits one inspector's votes for all GRN line items. Once all assigned inspectors submit, inspection is finalized via majority vote.

422.description: Inspector not assigned or inspection already finalized.

get.description: Returns the health status of database, Redis, and queue worker. No authentication required.

post.description: Supplier submits invoice referencing a PO or contract. Validates amount does not exceed PO/contract value and goods have been received.

422.description: Amount exceeds PO/contract value or goods not received.

post.description: Finance_Officer approves invoice. Creates corresponding payment record.

reason.example: Invoice amount does not match PO value.

get.description: Returns paginated in-app notifications for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Filter by exact event type, e.g. PurchaseRequestSubmitted.

get.description: Returns approved and partially-paid invoices with amount_due and due_date. Roles: Finance_Officer.
Returns a single payment record with invoice and processor details.

post.description: Records a full or partial payment. Updates invoice paid_amount and transitions payment/invoice status. Roles: Finance_Officer.
Creates PO with unique PO number in format PO-{TENANT_CODE}-{YEAR}-{SEQ} and encumbers budget.

put.description: Pre-acceptance: free amendment. Post-acceptance: sets pending supplier acknowledgment.

post.description: Transitions PO from draft to issued and sends PO to supplier.
Supplier accepts the PO (issued → accepted).
Supplier rejects the PO (issued → rejected). Releases budget encumbrance.
Cancels PO from draft, issued, or accepted status. Releases budget encumbrance.
Creates a new PR in draft status. PR number generated in format PR-{TENANT_CODE}-{YEAR}-{SEQ}.

422.description: PR not in draft status or validation error.
PR is not in draft status.

post.description: Validates budget and transitions PR to pending_approval, triggering the approval workflow.

422.description: Budget exceeded — includes available_balance and shortfall.
PR cannot be cancelled in current state.

post.description: Uploads and attaches a document. Allowed types: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PNG, JPG, JPEG. Max size: 10 MB.

get.description: Returns role-specific KPI data: PR counts by status, active tenders, PO fulfillment rate, budget utilization, pending approvals, overdue deliveries. Cached 5 min.
Average PR-to-PO cycle time in days, with optional filters. Cached 5 min.
Expenditure by department, category, and supplier with month-over-month trends. Cached 5 min.

post.description: Any external party can submit a supplier registration. Tenant is resolved via X-Tenant-ID header or subdomain. Returns HTTP 201 with status pending_verification.

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of suppliers for the active tenant.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Partial match on organization_name, contact_name, or contact_email.

get.description: Returns a single supplier with documents and performance metrics.

post.description: Transitions supplier from pending_verification to active. Sends confirmation email.
Blacklists a supplier with a mandatory documented reason. Blacklisted suppliers cannot submit bids or receive POs. Recorded in the audit log.

reason.example: Multiple delivery failures and misrepresentation of quality.

get.description: Returns aggregate on-time delivery rate, quality acceptance rate, and paginated performance history.

post.description: Accepted types: tin_certificate, vat_certificate, business_license, performance_bond, other. Max 10 MB. Automatically versions the document for the given type.

get.description: Returns all tenants. Requires System_Admin role.

post.description: Provisions a new tenant with default roles, permissions, and configuration. Requires System_Admin role.

patch.description: Activates, suspends, or deactivates a tenant. Status change recorded in audit log.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Partial match on title, reference_number, or description.

post.description: Creates a new tender in draft status.

200.description: Tender with documents and bid summary.

post.description: Transitions tender from draft to published and notifies eligible active suppliers.
Cancels a draft or published tender. Notifies all suppliers who submitted bids.

cancellation_reason.example: Budget cuts have required cancellation of this procurement.

patch.description: New deadline must be after the current deadline and the current deadline must not have passed.

post.description: Allowed types: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PNG, JPG, JPEG. Max 10 MB. Stored in tenant-scoped path.

get.description: Returns a paginated, searchable, sortable list of users within the active tenant.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by name or email (partial match).

post.description: Creates a new user within the active tenant. Sends a welcome email with a 24-hour password-setup link.

delete.description: Soft-deletes the user. Rejected if user has active PRs or POs.

PaginationMeta.description: Pagination metadata included in list responses.

XTenantID.name: X-Tenant-ID
XTenantID.description: Tenant UUID. Required when not using subdomain or JWT claim for tenant resolution.

XRequestID.name: X-Request-ID
XRequestID.description: Optional client-supplied request ID for tracing. If omitted, the server generates one. Echoed in the response X-Request-ID header.

X-Request-ID.description: UUID v4 request identifier for distributed tracing. Present on every response.

bearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token. Obtain via POST /api/v1/auth/login.

tags.name: Approvals
tags.description: Approval actions — approve, reject, return for revision. Pending approvals and history.

tags.name: Approval Workflows
tags.description: Configure multi-level approval chains for PRs, Tenders, POs, Contracts, and Invoices.

tags.name: Audit Logs
tags.description: Immutable audit trail — read-only access, reject all modifications.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Login, logout, token refresh, and password reset.

tags.name: Bids
tags.description: Bid submission and revision for tenders. Includes document uploads.

tags.name: Bid Evaluation
tags.description: Weighted scoring criteria, score submission, rankings, and winner selection.

tags.name: Budgets
tags.description: Annual budget allocation, tracking, transfers, and utilization reports.

tags.name: Contracts
tags.description: Contract lifecycle: creation, activation, amendment, termination, and document uploads.

tags.name: Departments
tags.description: Department management within tenant scope.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: Tenant-scoped file download and soft-delete.

tags.name: Goods Receipts
tags.description: Goods receipt note creation, committee inspection workflow, and GRN lifecycle.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Platform health check endpoint.

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Real-time inventory search and retrieval per warehouse.

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Supplier invoice submission, validation, approval, and rejection.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: In-app notifications: list, mark as read, unread count.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Payment tracking, schedule, and recording against invoices.

tags.name: Purchase Orders
tags.description: Purchase order creation, issuance, acceptance, rejection, amendment, and cancellation.

tags.name: Purchase Requests
tags.description: Purchase request creation, lifecycle, and document attachments.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: KPI dashboard, procurement timeline, spending analytics, and export.

tags.name: Suppliers
tags.description: Supplier registration, verification, blacklisting, compliance documents, and performance metrics.

tags.name: Tenants
tags.description: System_Admin — tenant registration, status management, and analytics.

tags.name: Tenders
tags.description: Tender lifecycle: create, publish, cancel, extend deadline, and document uploads.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User management within tenant scope.
